About Us

LEGEND INDUSTRIES

Hyderabad-based bag manufacturing and corporate gifting company established in 1998. Built for execution, not retail display.

Our Story

25+ Years of Reliable Manufacturing

LEGEND INDUSTRIES was established in 1998 in Hyderabad, Telangana. From the beginning, our focus has been on bulk bag manufacturing and corporate supply — not retail, not one-off sales.

We operate a dedicated production unit designed for medium to large quantity orders. Our infrastructure, processes, and team are built around reliable production, consistent quality, and on-time delivery.

Over the years, we have worked with corporate clients, distributors, institutions, and marketing agencies across India. Our focus remains on execution quality and building long-term business relationships.

1998
Established
25+
Years Active
PAN
India Supply
100%
Bulk Focus
Our Clients

Who We Work With

We typically work with businesses requiring consistent supply, corporate clients with branding needs, and distributors handling volume sales.

Corporate Companies

Employee kits, onboarding packages, branded merchandise, and promotional items for internal and external use.

Distributors & Wholesalers

Consistent bulk supply for distribution networks. Reliable production capacity for repeat orders.

Institutions & Organizations

Schools, colleges, NGOs, and other organizations needing branded bags and products in volume.

Event & Marketing Agencies

Promotional bags, event kits, and branded products for campaigns, conferences, and corporate events.

Our Strength

Why Businesses Choose Us

  • Consistent production quality across every order
  • Reliable delivery timelines — 1 to 3 weeks
  • Strong experience in custom and bulk orders
  • Direct factory-level manufacturing
  • Suitable for repeat and long-term business
  • PAN India supply capability
  • Full customization — logo to complete design
  • Structured quality checks before dispatch
Operations

Production & Delivery

Production Capacity

Structured for medium to large quantity orders. Consistent capacity aligned for bulk and repeat business.

Quality Checks

Structured quality inspection at multiple stages — raw material, production, and pre-dispatch.

Delivery

1–3 week typical timeline. PAN India delivery. Committed timelines discussed and confirmed during order process.

Work With Us

If you're looking for long-term supply or bulk production, we're the right partner.
